approvalStatus: APPROVED (validation-only; tolerances are physically/methodologically justified, NOT fitted to encompass observed differences)
referenceComparison: current engine (swisseph SWIEPH, direct of-date tropical) vs Skyfield/DE440s primary oracle

tolerances.boundaryCaseRule: certify by transition time (CLASS_C), not rounded value
tolerances.sourceEvidence: Swiss Ephemeris SWIEPH is a compressed fit to JPL DE (<1" internal); residual = frame/nutation nuance
tolerances.justification: sub-arcsec ephemeris agreement; 5" absorbs of-date frame nuance

tolerances.sourceEvidence: DE440s Mars barycenter vs swisseph Mars center (few-arcsec) + fit
tolerances.justification: barycenter offset negligible from Earth (<1 mas for Mars); 8" margin

tolerances.sourceEvidence: DE440s Jupiter BARYCENTER vs swisseph planet center (up to few arcsec from Earth)
DE440s Saturn BARYCENTER vs swisseph planet center
swisseph SWIEPH lunar model vs DE440s incl. Delta-T model difference, light-time, finite-difference; modern era << 15", pre-1900 up to ~30" from Delta-T/lunar-theory divergence
tolerances.justification: physical lunar/Delta-T divergence over the 1850-2150 corpus; still < 1/240 of a Pada
retrograde SIGN is the decisive discrete quantity (CLASS_A)
station epoch certified by speed zero-crossing time

tolerances.sourceEvidence: independent osculating node (state vector + precession-to-date) vs SE_TRUE_NODE; R1 max 46"
candidate lahiri-navagraha-v1-candidate vs production SE Lahiri; R1 max 0.0005"
current-engine vs oracle root-found crossing instant
tolerances.justification: sub-arcsec longitude agreement => sub-minute transition agreement for the Moon; tighter for slower bodies

tolerances.boundaryCaseRule: exact equality except within guard band (then CLASS_C transition certification)

r2ObservedMaxArcsec.note: current engine (swisseph SWIEPH direct of-date) vs Skyfield/DE440s over 473 fixtures; every observed maximum is COMFORTABLY WITHIN its physical tolerance (no inflation).
